name: web-typography
description: Select, pair, and implement typefaces for web projects. Use when the user mentions "font pairing", "which typeface", "line height", "responsive typography", "web font loading", "type hierarchy", "variable fonts", "FOUT/FOIT", or "typographic scale". Also trigger when choosing between system fonts and web fonts, optimizing font loading performance, or designing readable long-form content layouts. Covers readability evaluation, CSS implementation, and performance optimization. For overall UI desig
